title: Tightened Docs Viewer App Architecture Gate
summary: Updated the Development Workflow Docs Viewer App Architecture Gate with strict rules from the app refactor cleanup: compatibility paths must be removed, renamed as current owner contracts, or tracked with explicit removal criteria before adjacent feature work proceeds.
effect: Future Docs Viewer runtime and app-architecture slices now have concrete rules for app contexts, hosted-view safety, generated-data access, management write authority, and avoiding new feature ownership in the private app runtime coordinator.
verification: rg scans confirmed vague prefer/temporary compatibility wording was replaced in development-workflow.md
